name: @forgeax/hello-app
description: One-screen createApp(canvas) takeoff exemplar (feat-20260518-app-shell-game-loop M6 / D-12).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT (mirrors hello-cube). hello-app smoke literal lives in apps/hello/app/package.json#forgeax.smokeInvocation + .github/workflows/ci.yml only; the scripts/smoke.mjs verdict is clearColor-only (D-12) + onError/console.error counts == 0.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-app + @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: triangle baseline anchor only; hello-app smoke covers GPU end-to-end via clearColor + onError/console.error counts

bench.reason: createApp thin-wrapper exemplar; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the createApp(canvas) one-screen takeoff exemplar (D-12)
